title: Pinnacle West Declares Quarterly Dividend
text: PHOENIX--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Pinnacle West Capital Corp.'s board of directors voted today to raise the Company's dividend by about 1.7%, or 6 cents per common share annually.

title: Pinnacle West Sets Date for 2023 Third-Quarter Financial Results, Webcast/Conference Call
text: PHOENIX--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Pinnacle West Capital Corp. plans to release its 2023 third-quarter financial results before U.S. financial markets open on Thursday, Nov. 2, 2023.
